status_note.blocker: Deep-history news coverage. The windowed market scan now reaches 30 days of resolved markets, but the news sources don't: GDELT proved unreliable (succeeded 0/30 queries, used for 0/30 groups this run) and NewsAPI's free tier only returns articles from the last ~30 days, so 14/30 selected markets had zero usable headlines. Until a reliable historical headline source is added, the market scan outruns the news data. Parking the backtest line for now — live calibration on the expanded market universe (3,098 tracked niche markets) is the faster path to real numbers.
